'''dhachaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassemydid|thalassemydid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassemydid|thalassemydid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhachaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæchæbæth|dhæchæbæth]] || [[word:dhæchæbæj|dhæchæbæj]] || [[word:dhæchæbæsh|dhæchæbæsh]] || [[word:dhæchæbæ|dhæchæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhachachabath|dhachachabath]] || [[word:dhachachabaj|dhachachabaj]] || [[word:dhachachabash|dhachachabash]] || [[word:dhachachaba|dhachachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhachabath|dhachabath]] || [[word:dhachabaj|dhachabaj]] || [[word:dhachabash|dhachabash]] || [[word:dhachaba|dhachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhachafbath|dhachafbath]] || [[word:dhachafbaj|dhachafbaj]] || [[word:dhachafbash|dhachafbash]] || [[word:dhachafbaf|dhachafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhachabatha|dhachabatha]] || [[word:dhachabaja|dhachabaja]] || [[word:dhachabasha|dhachabasha]] || [[word:dhachabaka|dhachabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhachabath|dhachabath]] || [[word:dhachabaj|dhachabaj]] || [[word:dhachabash|dhachabash]] || [[word:dhachaba|dhachaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhachabathal|dhachabathal]] || [[word:dhachabajal|dhachabajal]] || [[word:dhachabashal|dhachabashal]] || [[word:dhachabakal|dhachabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhachabathatha|dhachabathatha]] || [[word:dhachabajaja|dhachabajaja]] || [[word:dhachabashasha|dhachabashasha]] || [[word:dhachabaka|dhachabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhachabathan|dhachabathan]] || [[word:dhachabajan|dhachabajan]] || [[word:dhachabashan|dhachabashan]] || [[word:dhachabakan|dhachabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhachabathaoro|dhachabathaoro]] || [[word:dhachabajaoro|dhachabajaoro]] || [[word:dhachabashaoro|dhachabashaoro]] || [[word:dhachabakaoro|dhachabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
